title: GVH-108 Stepmom Fucking, Yu Kawakami - Yu Kawakami (Shizuku Morino)
description: Yu, a mother who is enthusiastic about education, treated her son who was about to take the examination with a stricter attitude. But one day, an adult video is found in his son's room. Yuu yelled, "I don't want you to see such a vulgar thing!", But the son stabbed him that he was not his mother's tool. Not only that, his son is sexually curious about Yu's ripe body and attacks Yu as if to hit the stress of his bindings! A mother who is overwhelmed by unexpected rebellion and has a forbidden relationship with her son. And the former master-slave relationship was reversed by the endless sexual counterattack of his son ... Free point gift for the first 1,000 yen!
